title: SnowyBoi64's CIT Utility
description: Adds a bunch of CIT Indicators to Items based on NBT Tags.
body:
This resource pack adds a bunch of CIT indicators to items, so make sure to use CIT-Resewn or Optifine with the pack!
The main objective of this pack is to just make situations where you have an item with special nbt a bit more easy to deal with and a lot more visually appealing. This includes BlockStateTag, EntityTag, and regular NBT Tag item.
Check out the DOCUMENTATION/WIKI down below for a list of the items and features added.
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kIghkrSg6VZFA2tIVoebzX7eh5AprEAdgmUhkpcFoMA/edit?usp=sharing
